    InitializationServlet - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    InitializationServlet is executed on application startup to initialize the application environment.
    InitializationServlet() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.InitializationServlet

    Enum representing available repository types.
    InvalidIssueDataException - Exception Class in model
    Custom exception for signalizing impropoer Issue creation/edition
    InvalidIssueDataException(String) - Constructor for exception class model.InvalidIssueDataException
     
    Issue - Class in model
    Class for storing Issue details
    Issue(String, String, User) - Constructor for class model.Issue
    Creates a new Issue with the given title, description, and reporter.
    Issue(String, String, User, LocalDateTime, User, BugStatus, Priority, Set) - Constructor for class model.Issue
    Creates a new Issue with additional optional data such as due date, assignee, status, priority, and tags.
    IssueDetailsServlet - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    IssueDetailsServlet handles GET requests to retrieve detailed information about a specific issue in JSON format.
    IssueDetailsServlet() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.IssueDetailsServlet

    Custom exception for signalizing that no such issue exists

    The list of all issues managed by this manager.
